title: Bird Game 3
about: Bird Game 3 refers to a fake video game on the nonexistent "Xbox 50" console, as seen in a series of AI-generated videos from TikTok in October 2025. The AI videos showed a Black man discovering the game in a store and talking to the grainy 2000s-era camera recording him. The concept of Bird Game 3 evolved over several videos in late 2025, as meme creators added to the game's lore largely using AI generation.
origin: On October 6th, 2025, TikToker[1] @ancient_meme_archive shared an AI-generated video of a Black man in a video game store picking up a copy of an "Xbox 50" game called "Bird Game 3" and showing it to the camera. Over 10 days, the video received roughly 227,900 likes.
